claim_gate.reason: Exact local transports expose useful low-bit symmetries, but observed and union-bound reach is logarithmic while exact inversion needs linear depth. The full-cube Fourier theorem also closes total global transports; only target-dependent partial maps or a proved polynomial-gap fiber walk remain.

falsifiers_triggered: Single-coordinate pivots are exact total transports but disappear after logarithmic depth on random labels.
Residue-matched swaps extend local reach but remain partial and logarithmic-depth.
Polynomial families of logarithmic-size explicit blocks have exponentially small collision probability at linear depth.
Finite low-bit transport is not evidence for a full relation solver.
The local no-go does not cover target-dependent partial fiber maps or polynomial-gap walks; total full-cube transports are closed separately.

fiber_contract.fiber: F_k(t)={x in {0,1}^m : sum_i A_i x_i=t mod 2^k}
fiber_contract.no_go_scope: explicit polynomial families of O(log n)-bit local block dictionaries only
fiber_contract.solver_requirement: compose through k=Theta(n) and return a verified full-modulus binary witness
fiber_contract.source: independent uniform A_i modulo 2^n with m=n+O(1)
fiber_contract.transport_goal: reversible map preserving the low-k residue and toggling residue bit k

identity_certificates.proof: Toggling x_j changes the sum by +/-A_j; when v2(A_j)=k, both signs equal 2^k modulo 2^(k+1).
Swapping unequal bits changes the sum by +/-(A_i-A_j), which is 2^k modulo 2^(k+1). Equal bits are fixed.
identity_certificates.scope: assignments with x_i != x_j when A_i-A_j=2^k mod 2^(k+1)

identity_certificates.proof: A transposition of two named block patterns is reversible; the certified subset-sum difference toggles exactly the next residue bit.
identity_certificates.scope: two block patterns whose sums agree mod 2^k and differ in bit k

local_dictionary_no_go.theorem_scope: Union bound for a target-independent explicit family of fixed blocks, each enumerating all 2^b subset patterns over independent uniform labels. Overlapping/adaptive blocks require a separate dependence audit; implicit global transforms are not covered.

Union bound for a target-independent explicit family of fixed blocks, each enumerating all 2^b subset patterns over independent uniform labels. Overlapping/adaptive blocks require a separate dependence audit; implicit global transforms are not covered.

first_falsifiers: The map extends to a total full-cube transport and is therefore killed by the Fourier pivot theorem.
The transform encodes an explicit polynomial correction dictionary.
Coverage collapses past O(log n) depth.
Computing one transport is equivalent to solving the target subset-sum instance.
open_architectures.mechanism: Compute a target-dependent partial map on F_k(t) that pairs inverse-polynomial source mass across the two child fibers without extending to a total full-cube bijection.
proof_obligations: Give a polynomial circuit for the partial map, inverse on its image, and success flag.
Prove it preserves F_k(t), toggles bit k, and covers inverse-polynomial source-weighted fiber mass.
Compose transports through k=Theta(n) without exponential condition-number or precision loss.
Beat classical reconstruction from the same transport oracle.
open_architectures.why_not_ruled_out: The total-transport Fourier collapse does not cover target-fiber partial maps, and the local dictionary union bound does not cover an implicit arithmetic relation sampler.

first_falsifiers: The transport graph fragments by a classical invariant.
The spectral gap or marked fraction is exponentially small.
Preparing a vertex in F_k(t) already costs exponential time at linear k.
open_architectures.mechanism: Use local certified swaps as edges of a walk on F_k(t), then implement a coherent child-fiber transfer from spectral structure rather than a named correction.
proof_obligations: Prove conductance or spectral gap on random density-one fibers through linear k.
Construct a starting-state preparation and child-marking reflection with polynomial resources.
Show the walk transfer produces a verified witness relation, not only a residue distinguisher.
Audit classical mixing and local-search baselines on the same graph.
open_architectures.why_not_ruled_out: Sparse local moves can generate a large connected component even when no single explicit move reaches every witness.

summary: Certified 3 exact 2-adic transport identities across 12 scaling rows. No explicit local class reached linear depth; 2/4 asymptotic rows rule out the polynomial small-block dictionary model at k=n/2.
